name: Cheerful Snowman
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a cheerful round snowman made of three stacked snowballs, a carrot nose, coal-button eyes and mouth, twig arms, a cozy knitted scarf and a top hat, a few snowflakes drifting around him

name: Winter Snowflake
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a single large symmetrical six-sided snowflake with delicate branching arms and detailed crystal patterns, perfectly centered, a few tiny snowflakes scattered in the background

name: Cozy Winter Mittens
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a matching pair of chunky knitted winter mittens joined by a cord, decorated with simple stripes and a snowflake pattern, plump cuffs, lying side by side

name: Hot Cocoa Mug
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a steaming mug of hot cocoa topped with fluffy marshmallows and a candy cane, gentle swirls of steam rising, a small cookie resting beside the mug on a saucer

name: Kids Sledding Downhill
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: two happy bundled-up kids riding a wooden sled speeding down a snowy hill, scarves flying behind them, arms raised with joy, a snowy slope with a couple of bare trees and snow spraying up

name: Snowy Cabin Scene
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a cozy little log cabin with snow piled on its roof, smoke curling from the chimney, warm windows, snow-covered pine trees on either side, a winding path and a snowy fence in front

name: Penguin in the Snow
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a cute round penguin wearing a striped winter hat and a scarf, standing on a patch of snow and ice, flippers out to the sides, a happy expression, a couple of snowflakes falling around it

name: Ice Skates Pair
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a pair of white figure ice skates with long laces tied together and hung by the boots, shiny curved blades, a small snowflake charm on the laces, presented neatly side by side

name: Bear in Winter Scarf
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a big friendly cartoon bear sitting in the snow wearing a chunky knitted scarf and a pom-pom hat, simple round body and big paws, a warm smile, a small snowdrift behind it

name: Snowflake Close-Up
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: an extreme close-up of one ornate six-pointed snowflake filling most of the frame, intricate lace-like crystal patterns and fern-like branches radiating from the center, fine detailed edges

name: Building a Snowman
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: two bundled-up children building a snowman together outdoors, one rolling a big snowball and one placing a carrot nose, scarves and mittens, a bucket and twigs nearby, snow falling and a few snowy trees

name: Mitten Snow Pattern
subject: holidays/winter
prompt: a single large cozy mitten with a wide ribbed cuff, decorated with a simple repeating pattern of snowflakes, hearts, and stripes, plump and rounded with bold easy shapes
